stat_block.text: *The Paladin* represents righteousness and resolute defense. As long as you have *The Paladin* invested, you gain the Shield Block general feat. If you already possess this feat, you gain an additional reaction at the start of your turn that can only be used to Shield Block.

abilities.name: Activate
abilities.trigger: You fail or critically fail a saving throw
abilities.effect: Adjust the result of your saving throw up by one degree of success.
